headline: Latest News In AI Chips - Vapi Advances Voice AI With $50 Million Series B
summary: The AI chip sector has witnessed notable advancements with Vapi's recent $50 million Series B funding round aimed at revolutionizing enterprise voice AI systems. Vapi, recognized for its platform that enhances voice interactions for businesses, is addressing the limitations of traditional phone systems by introducing adaptable voice agents capable of human-like conversations. With enterprise clients like Amazon and Intuit, Vapi's technology aims to elevate customer service experiences at...
